signals.signal_title: Energy Transfer positioning natural gas infrastructure as AI data center power supply
signals.signal_description: Energy Transfer is positioning its natural gas pipeline and storage infrastructure as a key power supply source for AI data center campuses. Active LinkedIn communications and investor messaging around behind-the-meter natural gas for data center power. Signals board awareness of AI infrastructure demand as growth opportunity.

signals.signal_title: Energy Transfer 20-year LNG SPA with Chevron — Lake Charles LNG digital operations
signals.signal_description: Energy Transfer signed a 20-year LNG Sales and Purchase Agreement with Chevron for the Lake Charles LNG export project. Large-scale LNG operations require advanced digital monitoring, process control, and safety systems — a meaningful IT investment signal for the facility.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $92.29B — highly commodity-exposed (Sunoco LP retail fuel pass-through inflates revenue). ~12,000 employees. Dallas HQ in STOLA — clean territory. No CIO, MSP, CoE, or AI programs identified. Co-CEO structure (Kelcy Warren + Tom Long) is founder-controlled and operationally focused. Confidence LOW. ai_maturity_score=5 (well below ≥15). WWT opportunity: Dallas STOLA account, no MSP displacement, but limited IT visibility and very commodity-exposed culture. Primary hook is natural gas AI data center positioning.
